title: atriplex argentea subsp. expansa
intro: Atriplex argentea subsp. expansa, also known as the saltbush, is a shrub native to Australia that is highly tolerant of salt and drought. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Atriplex argentea subsp. expansa include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and prevent certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits.
